suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the cpuStateRef pattern for avoiding stale closures in async execution loops. Workers implementing step/run execution features should use refs (cpuStateRef, isRunningRef) to access current state in setTimeout/setInterval callbacks rather than relying on closure-captured values.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features simulator-breakpoints, simulator-memory, simulator-speed all use cpuStateRef pattern in SimulatorCore.tsx run() function. This pattern is not documented but is consistent across simulator features.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Register 'agent-browser' as a service/tool for browser automation. The simulator features require visual verification (checking register values, memory updates, code highlighting) which requires browser automation via Playwright.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features simulator-presets, simulator-memory, simulator-speed all used 'agent-browser --session ... open http://localhost:4173/#/simulator' for verification. services.yaml only documents 'preview' service but doesn't mention agent-browser.
